title: Rusel DeMaria
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image=[[File:RuselDeMaria.jpg]] |name=Rusel DeMaria |birth= |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality= |occupation=Author{{WebCite|url=http://www.primagames.com/author/results.pperl?authorid=35105|text=Author Spotlight – Rusel DeMaria|archivedate=20061113122555}} |companies=[[Prima Games]] |website= }} '''Rusel DeMaria''' is an author of several computer game strategy guides. He wrote ''[[The Farlander Papers]]'' and ''[[The Stele Chronicles]]'', which were included with, and told the backstory to, ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing]]'' and [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] respectively. DeMaria later expanded these in ''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' and ''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''. He is also the author of ''[[Super Star Wars Official Game Secrets]]'' and ''[[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets]]''. ==Biography== Rusel DeMaria became a professional author in [[1981]]. In 1990, DeMaria founded [[Random House|Prima Publishing's]] [[Wikipedia:Strategy guide|strategy-guide]] division, originally Secrets of the Games but later renamed [[Prima Games]], with Ben Dominitz. Over the next six years, he wrote numerous strategy guides and experimented with different styles of writing and layout which have since become common in strategy guides. [[File:X-wingTeam.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Rusel DeMaria (center) with [[Edward Kilham]] (left) and [[Lawrence Holland]] (right)]] When [[Lawrence Holland]] and [[Edward Kilham]] began working on the [[1993]] [[LucasArts]] video game ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing]]'', DeMaria was brought into the project early to write ''[[The Farlander Papers]]'', a novella that was included with the game and told the story of player character [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander's]] first mission as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' Following the release of the game, DeMaria co-authored ''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' with the game's mission designers, [[David Wessman]] and [[David Maxwell]]. The strategy guide contained strategies for every mission in the game and continued Farlander's story. It also provided much early information on the workings of the [[Alliance Starfighter Corps/Legends|Alliance Starfighter Corps]]. When LucasArts released the sequel to ''X-wing'', [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']], in [[1994]], DeMaria was once more involved in the project, authoring ''[[The Stele Chronicles]]'', a second novella telling the story of the game's main character, [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]]. He once more teamed up with Wessman and Maxwell to produce ''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]'', in which he continued Stele's story. ==''Star Wars'' works==
